name: Slenderman | Creepypasta - Part 3
description:
●○●○● Oh, people are going missing? ●○●○●

Mainly children & teens? Lord have mercy, don't let it be..

Slenderman!!

Yup, it's Faceless Man..

But you don't exactly know that quite yet, not until this bastard starts coming for you, after you had seen him luring a 6 year old into the forest like 2 days ago..

So this entire week, you've been getting strange mail, written in god damn chicken scratch, saying you were next, so needless to say you kept your mouth shut paranoid as fuck.

●○●○●○●

Will you survive this freakishly tall and faceless entity?

Or will you suffer the same fate, and go missing like everybody else in town?

Who knows, maybe you'll even get yourself a hot, sexy, kidnapping man in your grasp..

I don't know 🤷‍♂️

●○●○●○●

I tried to make him as accurate as I could. Oh, btw, it may be a bit difficult if you're playing as a girl to try and 'get with him' because I guess the man is Homoromantic.

Overall though, it may be difficult, but who knows, you guys always manage to get through barriers and get freaky..

Oh and another thing, in the first message when it mentions the parents, you can decide if they died by Slenderman or they're still alive.

——————

OH! And another thing.. 14.4k IS FUCKING WILD..

Update: 20.7k WTF?!?! THANKS GUYS I GUESS 😧😱

Another update: 30.2k HUHH?!?!? AHHHH—
creator: I'm tired
